reviews.comment:
La atención muy buena y es bastante rápido a pesar de que se hace colas largas para cargar combustible. El problema es que cada tanto tienen inconvenientes con la utilización de la tarjeta serviclub y no puedes aprovechar los descuentos

(Translated by Google)
The service is very good and quite fast, even though there are long lines to fill up. The problem is that they occasionally have issues with the Serviclub card, preventing you from taking advantage of the discounts.
